text: - B. Timing for Payment - Subcontractor acknowledges that, in the event of a covered loss, a claim under the applicable policy may take additional time to be verified, approved, and funded by the insurance carrier. As such,  all  contingent  payment  provisions  described  in  Paragraphs  11  and  12  of  Exhibit  A  shall  apply  to payments and claims under the Builder's Risk or similar type property policies, as if the payments coming from the applicable carrier are payments from the Owner. This specifically includes any 'pay if paid' and 'pay when paid' provisions.
